## Checklist

- [ ] My skill folder name matches the `name` field in SKILL.md
- [ ] All required frontmatter fields are filled with valid enum values
- [ ] My skill has at least 3 examples (input + output pairs)
- [ ] My skill has a corresponding test file in `tests/skill-tests/`
- [ ] `python tools/validate-skills.py` passes locally
- [ ] `python tools/generate-catalog.py` has been run and CATALOG.md is up to date
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
